description: Create a GeoGebra visualization of the 'Chaos Game' fractal (Sierpinski Triangle) using London (-0.1, 51.5), Paris (2.3, 48.9), and Brussels (4.3, 50.8) as vertices. Generate a fractal point cloud of at least 500 iterations using the Chaos Game algorithm where each next point is the midpoint between the current point and a randomly selected vertex. Save the project as 'chaos_europe.ggb' in ~/Documents/GeoGebra/projects/.
